factor_labels.F2: Rivered inland relief versus sea coast
factor_labels.F5: Schist-phyllite and heritage versus granitic gneiss

factor_descriptions.F1: Strongest variables separate settlement, roads and holiday-home intensity from quieter upland contexts.
factor_descriptions.F2: Contrasts rivered inland relief with sea-facing coastal expression.
factor_descriptions.F3: Captures urban and built-up centre intensity.
factor_descriptions.F4: Contrasts cultural and holiday-home belts with inland water patterns.
factor_descriptions.F5: Contrasts schist/phyllite and heritage signals with granitic gneiss contexts.

cluster_labels.2: Open inland geology and protection landscape
cluster_labels.4: Low fjord and island coastal fringe
cluster_labels.7: Small near-sea settlement and heritage outliers
cluster_labels.8: Inland upland water and geology belt

landscape_type_labels.LT02: Open inland geology and protection landscape
landscape_type_labels.LT04: Low fjord and island coastal fringe
landscape_type_labels.LT07: Small near-sea settlement and heritage outliers
landscape_type_labels.LT08: Inland upland water and geology belt

landscape_type_descriptions.LT01: Coastal settlement and infrastructure mosaic with strong road, settlement and coast/fjord signals.
landscape_type_descriptions.LT02: Open inland geology and protection landscape with strong geology and protection signals.
landscape_type_descriptions.LT03: Forested roaded valley landscape with roaded valley and forested context.
landscape_type_descriptions.LT04: Low-relief sea-facing fringe with strong coastal-water expression.
landscape_type_descriptions.LT05: High open protected mountain landscape with strong relief and protected nature signals.
landscape_type_descriptions.LT06: Coastal fjord forest-open mosaic with mixed forest, open land and coast/fjord context.
landscape_type_descriptions.LT07: Small near-sea settlement and heritage outliers with small settlement and heritage signals.
landscape_type_descriptions.LT08: Inland upland water and geology belt with upland water and geology signals.

semantic_roles_note: Provisional mapping from the R7 factor labels so Trondelag can mirror Bornholm app logic. Recalibrate when regional controller layers and reviewed Norwegian landscape semantics replace placeholders.
method_note: Data-driven geocontext R7 app bundle generated 2026-05-18 from outputs/trondelag/landscape_challenger_culture_settlement_roads_pop250_2026-05-13. Paths use REGIONAL_LANDSCAPE_PIPELINE_ROOT, defaulting locally to C:/gislab/regional-landscape-pipeline. R7 is the interactive app level, with R6/R5 as lightweight rollups. Earlier R8 handoff (89312 hexes) and R9 minimal package (625387 hexes) are too large for light runtime and are intentionally not exposed or required. PDF-derived landscape types are parked and not used for landscape_geojson or factor_scores.
